name: Academy Camp Recap
description: Summary content from academy training camps, pre-season tours, or special development programs. Showcases the investment in youth development.

summary.example: A week of intensive training, friendly matches, and team building in Umag. Our young Blues are ready for the second half of the season.

guidelines: Photo carousel with 5-8 slides: Slide 1 is the title card with a group photo. Slides 2-6 are action and candid photos from the camp. Slide 7 shows stats and key takeaways. Slide 8 is a group photo or closing message. Use the green academy accent. Captions should tell the story of the camp experience. Tag location.
